analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme should focus on a cosmic, dark aesthetic with animations related to black holes. The current files need to be enhanced to include animated objects, slides, and a cohesive black hole theme.

improvements.description: Add interactive sections for black hole facts, animated slides for visual effects, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed color palette.
Update the JavaScript file to include functionality for animated slides, interactive buttons, and smooth transitions for mobile menu toggling.
